linting.notes: This is a GitHub organization configuration repository containing only YAML/Markdown templates. No linting infrastructure is present or needed.

testing.notes: This repository contains no code or tests. It provides organization-level GitHub templates (issue templates, PR templates, organization profile).

ci.notes: No CI/CD workflows present. This repository serves static configuration files for the opendatahub-io GitHub organization.

build.notes: No build system. Repository contains only static YAML and Markdown template files.

conventions.notes: Repository follows GitHub's conventions for organization-level configuration: ISSUE_TEMPLATE/ directory for issue forms, PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md for PR template, profile/README.md for organization profile.

container_recipe.notes: No container recipe needed. This repository contains only static configuration files with no executable code.

validation.summary: No validation performed - repository contains only static GitHub configuration templates with no code, tests, or build processes.

gaps: This is not a code repository - it's a GitHub organization configuration repository
Contains only 5 files: 2 issue templates (YAML), 1 PR template (Markdown), 1 organization profile README, and 1 LICENSE
No code files in any programming language
No test infrastructure (intentional - nothing to test)
No linting configuration (intentional - static templates only)
No CI/CD workflows (intentional - no validation needed for templates)
No build system (intentional - no build artifacts)
